name: Multi Step Loader
summary: A full-screen loader displaying multiple loading steps that complete sequentially with checkmark animations.
detailedDescription: Multi Step Loader creates a full-screen overlay loader that displays a sequence of loading steps with progress indication. The component uses useState to track current step (0 to length-1) and useEffect with configurable duration (default 2000ms) to advance through steps automatically. Each step shows a checkmark icon - outlined for pending steps, filled for completed steps, with the current step highlighted in lime-500. Steps are vertically stacked with 40px spacing, animating y-position based on current value. Opacity decreases with distance from current step (1 - distance * 0.2). The loader uses AnimatePresence for fade in/out (opacity 0 to 1), with backdrop-blur-2xl for frosted glass effect. A radial gradient mask (900px at center, transparent 30%, white) creates soft edge vignette. Loop mode cycles back to start after final step; non-loop mode stops at last step. This component is ideal for multi-stage processes like file uploads, onboarding flows, data migrations, or any sequential operation where showing progress through stages improves user experience and reduces perceived wait time.
purpose: Display sequential loading progress through stages
Provide visual feedback for multi-step operations
Reduce perceived wait time with step indicators
behavior: Advances through steps at configurable intervals
Highlights current step with lime-500 color
Shows filled checkmarks for completed steps
Animates step list y-position with progress
Fades opacity based on distance from current
Loops or stops based on configuration
recommendations: Use as a focal animated accent and pair with calmer surrounding components.
